title: axonopus polystachyus
intro: Axonopus polystachyus, commonly known as the broad-leaved carpet grass or broad-leaved panicgrass, is a type of tropical grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Axonopus polystachyus include its ability to treat fever, headache, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
